prayer.title: 🕐️ Morning Prayer
prayer.modeh_ani: מודה אני לפניך — I gratefully thank You, living and eternal King, for returning my soul within me with compassion.
prayer.blessing: Blessed are You who clothes the naked — provide for all my needs this day.
prayer.psalm: **Psalm 32:8**: "I will instruct you and teach you in the way you should go."
prayer.proverb: **Proverbs 11:1**: "Dishonest scales are an abomination to the Lord, but accurate weights are His delight."
prayer.intention: Protect my family while I work. Guard their hearts and minds.
prayer.closing: May your work today be a pleasing offering. May your rest tonight be deep and restorative.

world_news.title: 🌍 World News
world_news.headline: 🚨 BREAKING: Israel launches preemptive attack against Iran
world_news.summary: Israel and U.S. launched coordinated strikes on Iran Saturday morning. Explosions reported in Tehran. Iran's Supreme Leader transferred to secure location. This follows 12-day air war in June and represents major escalation in Middle East tensions. All Israeli airspace closed, schools/workplaces shut except essential services.
world_news.significance: Major geopolitical development affecting global stability and markets

ai_news.title: 🤖 AI News
ai_news.headline: OpenAI raises $110B at $840B valuation
ai_news.summary: Massive funding round signals continued AI investment frenzy. European sovereign AI solutions gaining traction. Smaller, efficient models reducing infrastructure costs and expanding deployment flexibility.
